lints.name: unindexed_foreign_keys
lints.title: Unindexed foreign keys
lints.description: Identifies foreign key constraints without a covering index, which can impact database performance.
lints.detail: Table \`public.plaza_likes\` has a foreign key \`plaza_likes_user_id_fkey\` without a covering index. This can lead to suboptimal query performance.
